description: Production Hardening - Seguranca, validacao, UX e testes para producao

userStories.title: Fix admin-data JWT verification
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I need proper JWT verification in admin-data so that attackers cannot forge service_role tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace manual JWT parsing (atob/split) with supabase.auth.getUser(token) in supabase/functions/admin-data/index.ts lines 23-26
Remove the try/catch block that parses JWT payload manually
Admin endpoint still works for both service_role and whitelisted email users
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: CRITICAL: Current code does JSON.parse(atob(token.split('.')[1])) without signature verification

userStories.title: Fix wallet update RLS policy
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I need wallet RLS to prevent users from modifying their own balance via direct UPDATE.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new migration that drops and recreates wallet UPDATE policy
New policy allows UPDATE only on asaas_customer_id column, NOT balance
Users cannot SET balance directly via supabase-js .update()
Balance changes only through SECURITY DEFINER RPCs
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: Current WITH CHECK subquery is redundant and confusing. Restrict columns explicitly.

userStories.title: Fix withdrawal rollback safety
userStories.description: As a financial engineer, I need withdrawal to handle Asaas API failures safely so users never lose money.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'pending_transfer' status to wallet_transactions before calling Asaas API in supabase/functions/asaas-withdraw/index.ts
If Asaas transfer succeeds, update status to 'completed'
If Asaas transfer fails, rollback with status 'failed' and restore balance
If rollback fails, log CRITICAL error with all details for manual reconciliation
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: CRITICAL: Current code can lose user money if Asaas succeeds but DB rollback fails

userStories.title: Add HTML escaping in email templates
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I need user-provided names escaped in email HTML to prevent XSS in email clients.
acceptanceCriteria: Create escapeHtml() utility function in supabase/functions/_shared/email.ts
Escape all user-provided variables (workerName, companyName, jobTitle) before HTML insertion
Function handles: < > & " ' characters
All email templates use escaped values
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes:
User names injected directly into HTML like:

${workerName}

userStories.title: Add UUID validation on webhook
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I need webhook to validate externalReference is a valid UUID before passing to RPC.
acceptanceCriteria: Add UUID format validation for payment.externalReference in supabase/functions/asaas-webhook/index.ts
Return 400 Bad Request if externalReference is not a valid UUID
Also validate payment.id and payment.value are present and valid
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: No validation before passing userId to credit_deposit RPC

userStories.title: Fix asaas-checkout escrow status check
userStories.description: As a financial engineer, I need checkout to only proceed for completed/confirmed jobs, not just hired status.
acceptanceCriteria: In supabase/functions/asaas-checkout/index.ts, change application status filter to only accept 'completed' or status where company_checkout_confirmed_at IS NOT NULL
Remove 'hired' from allowed statuses for payment release
Add clear error message when status is wrong
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: Currently allows release for 'hired' status without requiring job completion

userStories.title: Fix escrow auto-release silent failure
userStories.description: As a financial engineer, I need escrow trigger to create worker wallet automatically if missing, not silently fail.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new migration that updates the auto-release trigger function
If worker has no wallet, create one automatically with balance 0
Then proceed with escrow release normally
Log wallet creation event for auditing
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: Current trigger does RAISE WARNING and RETURN NEW, silently leaving money locked

userStories.title: Add max iteration limit on asaas-sync
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need sync to have a max page limit to prevent infinite loops and resource exhaustion.
acceptanceCriteria: Add MAX_PAGES constant (10) in supabase/functions/asaas-sync/index.ts
Break loop after MAX_PAGES iterations
Log warning when max pages reached
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: while(hasMore) loop has no upper bound

userStories.title: Add CPF/CNPJ checksum validation
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need CPF/CNPJ validation with checksum to reject obviously invalid documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Create validateCPF() and validateCNPJ() functions with checksum algorithm in supabase/functions/asaas-deposit/index.ts
Reject known invalid patterns (all same digits like 11111111111)
Validate check digits mathematically
Return clear error message in Portuguese when invalid
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: Currently only checks string length (11 or 14 digits)

userStories.title: Centralizar admin email whitelist
userStories.description: As a developer, I need admin emails in a single source of truth to prevent frontend/backend desync.
acceptanceCriteria: In frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: read admin emails from VITE_ADMIN_EMAILS env var with fallback to current hardcoded list
In supabase/functions/admin-data/index.ts: read from ADMIN_EMAILS env var with fallback
Add VITE_ADMIN_EMAILS to frontend/.env.example
Add ADMIN_EMAILS to edge function env documentation
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: Currently hardcoded in 2 separate files that can diverge

userStories.title: Add rate limiting visual no forgot password
userStories.description: As a user, I want feedback when I send a password reset so I know it worked and cant spam the button.
acceptanceCriteria: Disable submit button for 60 seconds after successful send in frontend/src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx
Show countdown timer on disabled button
Show success message after send
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Fortalecer requisitos de senha
userStories.description: As a user, I need stronger password requirements so my account is more secure.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 8 characters (was 6) in frontend/src/pages/ResetPassword.tsx
Add simple password strength indicator (weak/medium/strong) based on length + character types
Also update Login.tsx registration password validation to match
Clear error messages in Portuguese for each requirement
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add mensagem no redirect de ProtectedRoute
userStories.description: As a user, I want to know why I was redirected to login so I understand what happened.
acceptanceCriteria: Pass redirect reason via URL param (e.g., /login?reason=session_expired)
Login.tsx reads reason param and shows appropriate message in Portuguese
ProtectedRoute.tsx adds reason param when redirecting
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Melhorar validacao de email
userStories.description: As a user, I want proper email validation so I dont submit obviously wrong emails.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace includes('@') with proper email regex in frontend/src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx
Validate format: user@domain.tld
Show clear error in Portuguese when format is wrong
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add validacao checksum CNPJ
userStories.description: As a company, I want CNPJ validation with checksum so I cant register with invalid documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Add validateCNPJ() function with check digit algorithm in frontend/src/pages/company/CompanyOnboarding.tsx
Reject all-same-digits patterns
Show error message in Portuguese when CNPJ is invalid
Validate on step transition (before proceeding to next step)
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Melhorar validacao PIX key
userStories.description: As a worker, I want PIX key format validation so I dont enter invalid keys for withdrawal.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate CPF key format (11 digits + checksum) in frontend/src/pages/Wallet.tsx
Validate CNPJ key format (14 digits + checksum)
Validate email key format (email regex)
Validate phone key format (+55 + 11 digits)
Validate random key format (UUID pattern)
Show specific error per type in Portuguese
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add confirmation dialogs para acoes destrutivas
userStories.description: As a user, I want confirmation before destructive actions so I dont accidentally lose data or money.
acceptanceCriteria: Add confirm dialog before withdrawal submit in Wallet.tsx (show amount and fee)
Add confirm dialog before job deletion in CompanyJobs.tsx
Add confirm dialog before application cancel in MyJobs.tsx
Dialogs have clear Portuguese text explaining the action
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Fix CompanyOnboarding step 2 validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need step 2 canProceed() to actually validate selections.
acceptanceCriteria: canProceed() for step 2 checks that hiring_goal or volume selection has been made in frontend/src/pages/company/CompanyOnboarding.tsx
Show error if trying to proceed without required selection
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build
userStories.notes: canProceed() currently returns true always for step 2

userStories.title: Add error states em CompanyDashboard
userStories.description: As a company user, I want to see error messages when dashboard data fails to load.
acceptanceCriteria: Add error state handling for all queries in frontend/src/pages/company/CompanyDashboard.tsx
Show user-friendly error message in Portuguese with retry button
Dashboard doesnt crash when a single query fails
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add loading skeletons
userStories.description: As a user, I want skeleton placeholders instead of generic spinners so loading feels faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace generic spinner in MainLayout with content skeleton
Replace generic spinner in CompanyLayout with content skeleton
Use simple CSS-only skeleton (no new dependencies) with animate-pulse
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Melhorar mensagens de erro
userStories.description: As a user, I want specific error messages so I know exactly what went wrong.
acceptanceCriteria: Login.tsx: differentiate between 'email not found', 'wrong password', 'email not confirmed'
ResetPassword.tsx: differentiate between 'token expired', 'token invalid', 'password too weak'
ForgotPassword.tsx: differentiate between 'email not found' and 'server error'
All messages in Portuguese
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add unsaved changes warning
userStories.description: As a user, I want a warning when leaving a page with unsaved changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Add beforeunload event listener when form is dirty in frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx
Add same in frontend/src/pages/company/CompanyProfile.tsx
Track dirty state by comparing current form values to initial values
Show browser native confirmation dialog
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Fix disabled buttons sem explicacao
userStories.description: As a user, I want to know why a button is disabled so I can take the right action.
acceptanceCriteria: Wallet.tsx: show 'Saldo insuficiente' text below disabled withdraw button when balance <= 0
CompanyJobCandidates.tsx: show 'Saldo insuficiente para contratar' when canHire is false
Use small text below button, not tooltip (better mobile support)
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add success feedback para acoes criticas
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear success messages after important actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Show toast after successful withdrawal in Wallet.tsx
Show toast after successful deposit initiation in DepositModal.tsx
Show toast after successful profile update in Profile.tsx and CompanyProfile.tsx
Show toast after successful job creation in CompanyCreateJob.tsx
Use existing toast system from ToastContext
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Remover tipos any do TypeScript
userStories.description: As a developer, I need proper TypeScript types to catch bugs at compile time.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace any[] with proper Job[] type in frontend/src/pages/Jobs.tsx line 13
Replace any with proper type in frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx line 17
Search for remaining 'any' types in frontend/src/ and fix them
Build passes with no type errors: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Fix ESLint exhaustive-deps warnings
userStories.description: As a developer, I need clean lint output with no warnings.
acceptanceCriteria: Fix all react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings (currently ~10)
Either add missing dependencies or use eslint-disable with justification comment
cd frontend && npm run lint shows zero warnings for exhaustive-deps
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Fix N+1 query em CompanyJobs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need batch fetching to avoid N+1 queries that slow down the page.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace individual candidate count queries with single batch query in frontend/src/pages/company/CompanyJobs.tsx lines 48-56
Use Supabase .in() or join to fetch all counts in one query
Same data displayed, fewer network requests
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add debouncing em search inputs
userStories.description: As a user, I want search to wait for me to finish typing before querying.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 300ms debounce on search input in frontend/src/pages/Jobs.tsx
Add 300ms debounce on search input in frontend/src/pages/company/CompanyJobs.tsx
Use simple setTimeout/clearTimeout pattern (no new dependencies)
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Fix MainLayout onboarding route
userStories.description: As a developer, I need correct route for worker onboarding redirect.
acceptanceCriteria: Fix hardcoded route in frontend/src/layouts/MainLayout.tsx line 38
Verify the route matches App.tsx router configuration
Worker onboarding redirect works correctly
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Limpar console.log/error em producao
userStories.description: As a developer, I need production code to use Sentry instead of console.log for error tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace console.error with Sentry.captureException in frontend/src/services/walletService.ts
Replace console.error with Sentry.captureException in frontend/src/hooks/useJobApplication.ts
Replace console.error with Sentry.captureException in frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx
Keep console.error only in development (check import.meta.env.DEV)
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add ARIA labels em form inputs
userStories.description: As a user with screen reader, I need form inputs properly labeled for accessibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Add aria-label or associated label element to all inputs in Login.tsx
Add to all inputs in ForgotPassword.tsx and ResetPassword.tsx
Add to all inputs in WorkerOnboarding.tsx and CompanyOnboarding.tsx
Add to all inputs in Profile.tsx and CompanyProfile.tsx
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add texto em status badges
userStories.description: As a colorblind user, I need text alongside color indicators to understand status.
acceptanceCriteria: All status badges in MyJobs.tsx show text label not just color
All status badges in CompanyJobs.tsx show text label
All status badges in CompanyJobCandidates.tsx show text label
Transaction status in Wallet.tsx and CompanyWallet.tsx shows text
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add focus management em modais
userStories.description: As a keyboard user, I need modals to trap focus and return focus on close.
acceptanceCriteria: DepositModal.tsx: focus first input on open, trap focus inside modal, return focus on close
RateModal.tsx: same focus management
Any confirmation dialogs added in FORM-04: same focus management
Escape key closes modals
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add keyboard navigation
userStories.description: As a keyboard user, I need correct tab order and keyboard shortcuts.
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements are reachable via Tab key
BottomNav.tsx items navigable via keyboard
Sidebar.tsx items navigable via keyboard
No focus traps outside of modals
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add testes para paginas de auth
userStories.description: As a developer, I need auth page tests to catch regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/pages/__tests__/Login.test.tsx with render, validation, submit tests
Create frontend/src/pages/__tests__/ForgotPassword.test.tsx with render and validation tests
Create frontend/src/pages/__tests__/ResetPassword.test.tsx with render and validation tests
All tests pass: cd frontend && npm run test -- --run
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add testes para ProtectedRoute
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ProtectedRoute tests to verify auth guard works.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/components/__tests__/ProtectedRoute.test.tsx
Test: redirects to /login when not authenticated
Test: renders children when authenticated
Test: shows loading state during auth check
All tests pass: cd frontend && npm run test -- --run
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add testes para fluxos financeiros
userStories.description: As a developer, I need financial flow tests to ensure money operations work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/components/__tests__/DepositModal.test.tsx with render and validation tests
Add withdrawal validation tests to frontend/src/services/walletService.test.ts
Test: deposit form validates minimum amount
Test: withdrawal validates balance and PIX key
All tests pass: cd frontend && npm run test -- --run
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add testes para validacao de formularios
userStories.description: As a developer, I need form validation tests for CPF, CNPJ, PIX, email, password.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/lib/__tests__/validation.test.ts
Test CPF validation (valid, invalid, all-same-digits)
Test CNPJ validation (valid, invalid, all-same-digits)
Test email validation (valid formats, invalid formats)
Test password strength (weak, medium, strong)
All tests pass: cd frontend && npm run test -- --run
Build passes: cd frontend && npm run build

userStories.title: Add testes para componentes criticos
userStories.description: As a developer, I need component tests for critical UI elements.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/components/__tests__/JobCard.test.tsx with render tests
Create frontend/src/components/__tests__/NotificationBell.test.tsx with render tests
Create frontend/src/components/__tests__/BottomNav.test.tsx with navigation tests
All tests pass: cd frontend && npm run test -- --run

userStories.title: Final build + lint clean
userStories.description: As a developer, I need zero errors and zero warnings in build and lint.
acceptanceCriteria: cd frontend && npm run build exits with 0 errors
cd frontend && npm run lint exits with 0 errors
cd frontend && npm run test -- --run exits with all tests passing
No TypeScript any types remaining
No ESLint warnings remaining
userStories.notes: Final validation task - only mark passes when everything is clean
